TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Uw-hu-kang.paw-li ś≤ÉŚ§ęŚ≤°¬∑ŚĆÖÁęč kakiliman nika udipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ ulabu nu luma'Śģ∂Śļ≠ŤÉĆśôĮ nilaaculan 1900 amihcaan, cu paw-li nilecuhan i aw-ti-li-wiy-ey-na, wamanida sa u pulapul a sipunu'ay ci uw-hu-kang.ey-se-hu.paw-li "Wolfgang Joseph Pauli,tada ngangan sa ci Wolf Pascheles,1869 amihcaan katukuh 1955 amihcaan", wina sa ci payl-ta.si-ce "Bertha Sch√ľtz. 1900ŚĻī, (Wolfgang Joseph Pauli,śú¨ŚźćÁāļWolf Pascheles,1869Ôľć1955),śĮćŤ¶™śėĮŤ≤ĚÁąĺŚ°Ē¬∑Ť®ĪŤĆ®(Bertha Sch√ľtz). u-li sipunu'ay ci ne-se-te.ma-he ci paw-li nu pasubanay a wama, maydih a mikining cinidaan, ci paw-li nu teban a ngangan kyu "ne-se-te" han. "śĀ©śĖĮÁČĻ". ci paw-li u baki tu bayi namakayniay i pu-la-ke u kasenengan a yu-tay a luma'; u baki nu wama u ciy-ke yu-tay u patahekalay tu cuda a misiwbayay Wolf Pascheles. Wolf Pascheles. pikikungan nu piayaw cay katenes, 1899 a mihcaan, ci pawli wamanida namakay yu-tay a milihayay malimad t ulu-ma-tinsukiw. wiyna ni paw-li ci pu-sa nanuadidi' namakayni I bayi misinziya tu tinsukiw; u baki nida sa u yu-tay amisulitay ci hu-li-te-li-si.si-ce Friederich Sch√ľtz. (Friederich Sch√ľtz). ci pawli u luma nu tinsukiw, nika nadikuda wina tu wama miliyas tu kiwkay. akay u kakunida a tademaw. . naayaway a niemekan śó©śúüÁ∂ďś≠∑ paw-li namicuda i wiy-ey-na cacay a un-li a cung-siy "D√∂blinger-Gymnasium, 1918 a mihcaan u matinengay micuda cinida mahedek tu. namahedek namicuda tusa a bulad nadikuda, u sipunu'ay a wawa ci pawli mihapiy tu sayaway nida a nikatkatan a nisulitan, ina nisulitan nu ael-pute.ayin-se-tan nu malakalakay a sasakamun a sulit. micumud cinida tu mu-ni-hay a daygaku, u pu-esu asaydan nida u u-li saydan ci a-nu.su-mu-huy. ci su-mu-huy u maniketay a mitudawaay, ci paw-li paytem sa mikingkiw tu nu dingki nu liyas a cing a labulnu icelanga cacuduhen a sasakamun. 1921 a mihcaan 7 abulad, ci paw-li makaala tu dateng a puesu a cuda. Anu.su-mu-huy manamuh tu nikateneng ni paw-li, milunguc ci paw-lian " sausiay a punu' nu lasubu a maminay a cuda "Encyklop√§die der mathematischen Wissenschaften" misulit tu masasu cengangay a cuda papidaduy tu sulit. "(Encyklop√§die der mathematischen Wissenschaften) . malaalatu pu-su nadikudan nu tusa abulad.ci paw-li mamin tu nida ku 237 katanayu' a nisulita. Ay-in-se-dab pasayna tina cudadan manamuh a kasenengan, nida acuda mapatahekal tu. katukuh ayda, ina cuda mahida tu u masa suayaway anu mukasi a tatinakuan a cuda nu naemekan. namhini sa cacay mihcaan, paw-li i ke-tin-ken-adaygaku ma-ke-se.pu.en malamiedapay, nadikudan sa taydaaca i ke-pen-ha-ken a mipasakamuay tu u-li apikingkiw a kawaw cacay a mihca, ya kakingkiwan i 1965 a mihcaan mala nil-se. pul a mikingkiway. namakay 1923 amihcaan katukuh1928 a mihcaan, i han-paw dagaku malasaydan. i twya a tuku, yadah ku pacakat nida tu liyang-ce hanany a sapisasakamu, widasa patahekal tu ni paw-li cayay a sasu lecaday a kawaw atu cayay katatudung a nuudipay a sasakamuen. 1929 amihcaan 5 a bulad, ci pawli pacubelis tu lu-ma tinsuliw. Tuyda amihcaan 12 abuld, cinida atu ci K√§the Margarethe Deppner mikikung, nika nikaleacawaw nuheni cay kakapah, tatusa namikikung cay pakamihcaan i 1930 amihca malaliyas tu kuheni. 1930 amihcaan nu a kalawpesan tu numihcaan, ci paw-li namilikung patahekal cinida tu ahemaway a pal a sasakamun pacebasa musakamu cay katenes, tahekal ku tabakiay nida a singki maayahuya a imelang. ci paw-li mididaw tu tidaay i sulise macapiay a nu balucuay a ising ci kal.zungke. ci zung-ke mineknek kunipi pasasutinaku tu sepi. Paw-li mala ni zung-ke- a sakasenengan a micudaday. Nika kalamkam, malingatu tu nikutkutan a kawaw sapi patinaku tu kamu ni zung-ke ya katinengan sananay a kakawaw, u tinakunida tatenga idaw ku macalilaway nu dikudananay a nidayeng. Mangalebe ku pulungay a dadatengan. ci zung-ke atu ci paw-li laad nuhwni yadah ku nikilukuan tu nikasasutigami nuheni, inatigami idaw kumisulitay a patahekal tu cuda "nudaan atu mahidaay ". ci-zung-ke tuyni ci paw-lian 400 a sepi misakapah a micuyaku mipasasuala tu nikilukuan a nisulitan "nubalucu' atu nuekim sa". ".
S.PHON: uw-ńßu-kaŇč.paw-r~…ĺi ****** kakir~…ĺiman nika udipan** ur~…ĺabu nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °**** nir~…ĺaa ¶ur~…ĺan **** amińß ¶aan, ¶u paw-r~…ĺi nir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i aw-ti-r~…ĺi-wij-…ô-na, wamanida sa u pur~…ĺapur~…ĺ a sipunu Ē~ °aj ¶i uw-ńßu-kaŇč.…ô-s…ô-ńßu.paw-r~…ĺi "wor~…ĺfgaŇč *os…ôpńß paur~…ĺi,tada ŇčaŇčan sa ¶i wor~…ĺf pas ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôs,**** amińß ¶aan katukuńß **** amińß ¶aan", wina sa ¶i pajr~…ĺ-ta.si- ¶…ô "b…ôrtńßa s ¶ńß*tz. *****, (wor~…ĺfgaŇč *os…ôpńß paur~…ĺi,***wor~…ĺf pas ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôs,*********),*********(b…ôrtńßa s ¶ńß*tz). u-r~…ĺi sipunu Ē~ °aj ¶i n…ô-s…ô-t…ô.ma-ńß…ô ¶i paw-r~…ĺi nu pasubanaj a wama, majdińß a mikiniŇč ¶inidaan, ¶i paw-r~…ĺi nu t…ôban a ŇčaŇčan kju "n…ô-s…ô-t…ô" ńßan. "***". ¶i paw-r~…ĺi u baki tu baji namakajniaj i pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô u kas…ôn…ôŇčan a ju-taj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °; u baki nu wama u ¶ij-k…ô ju-taj u patańß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu ¶uda a misiwbajaj wor~…ĺf pas ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôs. wor~…ĺf pas ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôs. pikikuŇčan nu piajaw ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs, **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i pawr~…ĺi wamanida namakaj ju-taj a mir~…ĺińßajaj mar~…ĺimad t ur~…ĺu-ma-tinsukiw. wijna ni paw-r~…ĺi ¶i pu-sa nanuadidi Ē~ ° namakajni i baji misinzija tu tinsukiw; u baki nida sa u ju-taj amisur~…ĺitaj ¶i ńßu-r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-si.si- ¶…ô fri…ôd…ôri ¶ńß s ¶ńß*tz. (fri…ôd…ôri ¶ńß s ¶ńß*tz). ¶i pawr~…ĺi u r~…ĺuma nu tinsukiw, nika nadikuda wina tu wama mir~…ĺijas tu kiwkaj. akaj u kakunida a tad…ômaw. . naajawaj a ni…ôm…ôkan **** paw-r~…ĺi nami ¶uda i wij-…ô-na ¶a ¶aj a un-r~…ĺi a ¶uŇč-sij "d*br~…ĺiŇč…ôr-gjmnasium, **** a mińß ¶aan u matin…ôŇčaj mi ¶uda ¶inida mańß…ôd…ôk tu. namańß…ôd…ôk nami ¶uda tusa a bur~…ĺad nadikuda, u sipunu Ē~ °aj a wawa ¶i pawr~…ĺi mińßapij tu sajawaj nida a nikatkatan a nisur~…ĺitan, ina nisur~…ĺitan nu a…ôr~…ĺ-put…ô.ajin-s…ô-tan nu mar~…ĺakar~…ĺakaj a sasakamun a sur~…ĺit. mi ¶umud ¶inida tu mu-ni-ńßaj a dajgaku, u pu-…ôsu asajdan nida u u-r~…ĺi sajdan ¶i a-nu.su-mu-ńßuj. ¶i su-mu-ńßuj u manik…ôtaj a mitudawaaj, ¶i paw-r~…ĺi pajt…ôm sa mikiŇčkiw tu nu diŇčki nu r~…ĺijas a ¶iŇč a r~…ĺabur~…ĺnu i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇča ¶a ¶uduńß…ôn a sasakamun. **** a mińß ¶aan * abur~…ĺad, ¶i paw-r~…ĺi makaar~…ĺa tu dat…ôŇč a pu…ôsu a ¶uda. anu.su-mu-ńßuj manamuńß tu nikat…ôn…ôŇč ni paw-r~…ĺi, mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ ¶i paw-r~…ĺian " sausiaj a punu Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺasubu a maminaj a ¶uda "…ôn ¶jkr~…ĺop*di…ô d…ôr matńß…ômatis ¶ńß…ôn wiss…ôns ¶ńßaft…ôn" misur~…ĺit tu masasu ¶…ôŇčaŇčaj a ¶uda papidaduj tu sur~…ĺit. "(…ôn ¶jkr~…ĺop*di…ô d…ôr matńß…ômatis ¶ńß…ôn wiss…ôns ¶ńßaft…ôn) . mar~…ĺaar~…ĺatu pu-su nadikudan nu tusa abur~…ĺad. ¶i paw-r~…ĺi mamin tu nida ku *** katanaju Ē~ ° a nisur~…ĺita. aj-in-s…ô-dab pasajna tina ¶udadan manamuńß a kas…ôn…ôŇčan, nida a ¶uda mapatańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu. katukuńß ajda, ina ¶uda mańßida tu u masa suajawaj anu mukasi a tatinakuan a ¶uda nu na…ôm…ôkan. namńßini sa ¶a ¶aj mińß ¶aan, paw-r~…ĺi i k…ô-tin-k…ôn-adajgaku ma-k…ô-s…ô.pu.…ôn mar~…ĺami…ôdapaj, nadikudan sa tajdaa ¶a i k…ô-p…ôn-ńßa-k…ôn a mipasakamuaj tu u-r~…ĺi apikiŇčkiw a kawaw ¶a ¶aj a mińß ¶a, ja kakiŇčkiwan i **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa nir~…ĺ-s…ô. pur~…ĺ a mikiŇčkiwaj. namakaj **** amińß ¶aan katukuńß**** a mińß ¶aan, i ńßan-paw dagaku mar~…ĺasajdan. i twja a tuku, jadańß ku pa ¶akat nida tu r~…ĺijaŇč- ¶…ô ńßananj a sapisasakamu, widasa patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ni paw-r~…ĺi ¶ajaj a sasu r~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a kawaw atu ¶ajaj katatuduŇč a nuudipaj a sasakamu…ôn. **** amińß ¶aan * a bur~…ĺad, ¶i pawr~…ĺi pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis tu r~…ĺu-ma tinsur~…ĺiw. tujda amińß ¶aan ** abur~…ĺd, ¶inida atu ¶i k*tńß…ô margar…ôtńß…ô d…ôppn…ôr mikikuŇč, nika nikar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaw nuńß…ôni ¶aj kakapańß, tatusa namikikuŇč ¶aj pakamińß ¶aan i **** amińß ¶a mar~…ĺar~…ĺijas tu kuńß…ôni. **** amińß ¶aan nu a kar~…ĺawp…ôsan tu numińß ¶aan, ¶i paw-r~…ĺi namir~…ĺikuŇč patańß…ôkar~…ĺ ¶inida tu ańß…ômawaj a par~…ĺ a sasakamun pa ¶…ôbasa musakamu ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs, tańß…ôkar~…ĺ ku tabakiaj nida a siŇčki maajańßuja a im…ôr~…ĺaŇč. ¶i paw-r~…ĺi mididaw tu tidaaj i sur~…ĺis…ô ma ¶apiaj a nu bar~…ĺu ¶uaj a isiŇč ¶i kar~…ĺ.zuŇčk…ô. ¶i zuŇč-k…ô min…ôkn…ôk kunipi pasasutinaku tu s…ôpi. paw-r~…ĺi mar~…ĺa ni zuŇč-k…ô- a sakas…ôn…ôŇčan a mi ¶udadaj. nika kar~…ĺamkam, mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu nikutkutan a kawaw sapi patinaku tu kamu ni zuŇč-k…ô ja katin…ôŇčan sananaj a kakawaw, u tinakunida tat…ôŇča idaw ku ma ¶ar~…ĺir~…ĺawaj nu dikudananaj a nidaj…ôŇč. maŇčar~…ĺ…ôb…ô ku pur~…ĺuŇčaj a dadat…ôŇčan. ¶i zuŇč-k…ô atu ¶i paw-r~…ĺi r~…ĺaad nuńßwni jadańß ku nikir~…ĺukuan tu nikasasutigami nuńß…ôni, inatigami idaw kumisur~…ĺitaj a patańß…ôkar~…ĺ tu ¶uda "nudaan atu mańßidaaj ". ¶i-zuŇč-k…ô tujni ¶i paw-r~…ĺian *** a s…ôpi misakapańß a mi ¶ujaku mipasasuar~…ĺa tu nikir~…ĺukuan a nisur~…ĺitan "nubar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° atu nu…ôkim sa". ".
S.FORM: Uw-hu-kang.paw-li ś≤ÉŚ§ęŚ≤°¬∑ŚĆÖÁęč kakiliman nika udipanÁĒüŚĻ≥ ulabu nu luma'Śģ∂Śļ≠ŤÉĆśôĮ nilaaculan 1900 amihcaan, cu paw-li nilecuhan i aw-ti-li-wiy-ey-na, wamanida sa u pulapul a sipunu'ay ci uw-hu-kang.ey-se-hu.paw-li "Wolfgang Joseph Pauli,tada ngangan sa ci Wolf Pascheles,1869 amihcaan katukuh 1955 amihcaan", wina sa ci payl-ta.si-ce "Bertha Sch√ľtz. 1900ŚĻī, (Wolfgang Joseph Pauli,śú¨ŚźćÁāļWolf Pascheles,1869Ôľć1955),śĮćŤ¶™śėĮŤ≤ĚÁąĺŚ°Ē¬∑Ť®ĪŤĆ®(Bertha Sch√ľtz). u-li sipunu'ay ci ne-se-te.ma-he ci paw-li nu pasubanay a wama, maydih a mikining cinidaan, ci paw-li nu teban a ngangan kyu "ne-se-te" han. "śĀ©śĖĮÁČĻ". ci paw-li u baki tu bayi namakayniay i pu-la-ke u kasenengan a yu-tay a luma'; u baki nu wama u ciy-ke yu-tay u patahekalay tu cuda a misiwbayay Wolf Pascheles. Wolf Pascheles. pikikungan nu piayaw cay katenes, 1899 a mihcaan, ci pawli wamanida namakay yu-tay a milihayay malimad t ulu-ma-tinsukiw. wiyna ni paw-li ci pu-sa nanuadidi' namakayni I bayi misinziya tu tinsukiw; u baki nida sa u yu-tay amisulitay ci hu-li-te-li-si.si-ce Friederich Sch√ľtz. (Friederich Sch√ľtz). ci pawli u luma nu tinsukiw, nika nadikuda wina tu wama miliyas tu kiwkay. akay u kakunida a tademaw. . naayaway a niemekan śó©śúüÁ∂ďś≠∑ paw-li namicuda i wiy-ey-na cacay a un-li a cung-siy "D√∂blinger-Gymnasium, 1918 a mihcaan u matinengay micuda cinida mahedek tu. namahedek namicuda tusa a bulad nadikuda, u sipunu'ay a wawa ci pawli mihapiy tu sayaway nida a nikatkatan a nisulitan, ina nisulitan nu ael-pute.ayin-se-tan nu malakalakay a sasakamun a sulit. micumud cinida tu mu-ni-hay a daygaku, u pu-esu asaydan nida u u-li saydan ci a-nu.su-mu-huy. ci su-mu-huy u maniketay a mitudawaay, ci paw-li paytem sa mikingkiw tu nu dingki nu liyas a cing a labulnu icelanga cacuduhen a sasakamun. 1921 a mihcaan 7 abulad, ci paw-li makaala tu dateng a puesu a cuda. Anu.su-mu-huy manamuh tu nikateneng ni paw-li, milunguc ci paw-lian " sausiay a punu' nu lasubu a maminay a cuda "Encyklop√§die der mathematischen Wissenschaften" misulit tu masasu cengangay a cuda papidaduy tu sulit. "(Encyklop√§die der mathematischen Wissenschaften) . malaalatu pu-su nadikudan nu tusa abulad.ci paw-li mamin tu nida ku 237 katanayu' a nisulita. Ay-in-se-dab pasayna tina cudadan manamuh a kasenengan, nida acuda mapatahekal tu. katukuh ayda, ina cuda mahida tu u masa suayaway anu mukasi a tatinakuan a cuda nu naemekan. namhini sa cacay mihcaan, paw-li i ke-tin-ken-adaygaku ma-ke-se.pu.en malamiedapay, nadikudan sa taydaaca i ke-pen-ha-ken a mipasakamuay tu u-li apikingkiw a kawaw cacay a mihca, ya kakingkiwan i 1965 a mihcaan mala nil-se. pul a mikingkiway. namakay 1923 amihcaan katukuh1928 a mihcaan, i han-paw dagaku malasaydan. i twya a tuku, yadah ku pacakat nida tu liyang-ce hanany a sapisasakamu, widasa patahekal tu ni paw-li cayay a sasu lecaday a kawaw atu cayay katatudung a nuudipay a sasakamuen. 1929 amihcaan 5 a bulad, ci pawli pacubelis tu lu-ma tinsuliw. Tuyda amihcaan 12 abuld, cinida atu ci K√§the Margarethe Deppner mikikung, nika nikaleacawaw nuheni cay kakapah, tatusa namikikung cay pakamihcaan i 1930 amihca malaliyas tu kuheni. 1930 amihcaan nu a kalawpesan tu numihcaan, ci paw-li namilikung patahekal cinida tu ahemaway a pal a sasakamun pacebasa musakamu cay katenes, tahekal ku tabakiay nida a singki maayahuya a imelang. ci paw-li mididaw tu tidaay i sulise macapiay a nu balucuay a ising ci kal.zungke. ci zung-ke mineknek kunipi pasasutinaku tu sepi. Paw-li mala ni zung-ke- a sakasenengan a micudaday. Nika kalamkam, malingatu tu nikutkutan a kawaw sapi patinaku tu kamu ni zung-ke ya katinengan sananay a kakawaw, u tinakunida tatenga idaw ku macalilaway nu dikudananay a nidayeng. Mangalebe ku pulungay a dadatengan. ci zung-ke atu ci paw-li laad nuhwni yadah ku nikilukuan tu nikasasutigami nuheni, inatigami idaw kumisulitay a patahekal tu cuda "nudaan atu mahidaay ". ci-zung-ke tuyni ci paw-lian 400 a sepi misakapah a micuyaku mipasasuala tu nikilukuan a nisulitan "nubalucu' atu nuekim sa". ".

"***". ¶i paw-r~…ĺi u baki tu baji namakajniaj i pu-r~…ĺa-k…ô u kas…ôn…ôŇčan a ju-taj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °; u baki nu wama u ¶ij-k…ô ju-taj u patańß…ôkar~…ĺaj tu ¶uda a misiwbajaj wor~…ĺf pas ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôs. wor~…ĺf pas ¶ńß…ôr~…ĺ…ôs. pikikuŇčan nu piajaw ¶aj kat…ôn…ôs, **** a mińß ¶aan, ¶i pawr~…ĺi wamanida namakaj ju-taj a mir~…ĺińßajaj mar~…ĺimad t ur~…ĺu-ma-tinsukiw. wijna ni paw-r~…ĺi ¶i pu-sa nanuadidi Ē~ ° namakajni i baji misinzija tu tinsukiw; u baki nida sa u ju-taj amisur~…ĺitaj ¶i ńßu-r~…ĺi-t…ô-r~…ĺi-si.si- ¶…ô fri…ôd…ôri ¶ńß s ¶ńß*tz.
